title: FinnGen Analyses
description: Access FinnGen R10 GWAS summary statistics and endpoint analyses. This module integrates genome-wide association data from the FinnGen biobank (500,000+ Finnish participants) with your OMOP CDM cohorts.
tips: FinnGen R10 includes over 2,200 binary and quantitative endpoints derived from Finnish national health registry data.
Use the Endpoint Browser tab to search endpoints and view association results before importing to your study.
FinnGen GWAS results can be cross-referenced with your OMOP cohorts by mapping FinnGen ICD-10 codes to OMOP concept IDs.
Download summary statistics for selected endpoints using the Export button for meta-analysis or Mendelian randomization workflows.
